news.summary: This morning, U.S. stocks showed positive momentum, with the Dow Jones index surging over 150 points. As of Wednesday's market opening, the Dow climbed 0.43% to 41,002.53, the NASDAQ increased by 0.12% to 17,711.72, and the S&P 500 saw a 0.21% rise to 5,618.52. In terms of sector performance, communication services shares were up by 0.6%, while information technology stocks fell by 0.1% on Wednesday. Walt Disney Co (NYSE: DIS) announced strong fiscal second-quarter 2025 results, with a 7% year-on-year revenue growth to $23.62 billion, surpassing analyst expectations of $23.14 billion. The company's Entertainment and Experiences divisions drove this growth, resulting in an adjusted EPS of $1.45, beating the consensus of $1.20. For fiscal 2025, Disney anticipates an adjusted EPS of $5.75. More details are available on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Dow up 150 points as Disney reports upbeat Q2 results; Dow at 41,002.53, NASDAQ at 17,711.72, S&P 500 at 5,618.52.

news.summary: Nearly 6.3 million guests were accommodated by hotels falling under the H World brands, which marks a significant 30% increase from the previous year. Overall hotel occupancy rates were impressive, surpassing 84%, particularly excelling in second-tier cities where rates exceeded 90%. During the recent five-day holiday period, H World hosted over 43,000 international guests, reflecting a substantial 75% increase compared to the same period last year.
news.headline: H World Group welcomed 6.3 million guests during China's May Day holiday, with 84% occupancy rate and 30% increase from 2024.

news.summary: In the Business Services Industries, the Head of a Prominent Home Inspection Franchise has been Recognized as the Maverick of the Year. Hailing from TAMPA, Fla., this achievement was announced on May 7, 2025. Pillar To Post, known as North America's largest home inspection company, is soaring to new heights this year. The esteemed CEO of the brand, Charles, has been a pivotal figure in this success story...
news.headline: Pillar To Post CEO Charles Furlough wins Bronze Stevie Award as Maverick of the Year in Business Services at 2025 American Business Awards.

news.summary: Dublin - According to a report on the Germany construction market by ResearchAndMarkets.com, the industry is projected to decrease by 1.8% in real terms in 2025. This decline would make it the fifth consecutive year of negative growth. The challenging conditions are attributed to factors like elevated inflation rates and high costs of construction materials. The report covers various sectors including commercial, industrial, infrastructure, energy and utilities, institutional, and residential markets. The analysis extends up to 2029, offering insights into the state of the construction industry in Germany.
news.headline: Germany construction industry output to fall by 1.8% this year, 5th consecutive decline due to inflation, costs, and weakened demand.

news.summary: In Dublin, a report on the Malaysia Construction Market highlights forecasts by sector including Commercial, Industrial, Infrastructure, Energy and Utilities, Institutional, and Residential markets until Q1 2025. ResearchAndMarkets.com offers insights, projecting a 6% real terms expansion in the Malaysian construction industry in 2025. This growth is driven by investments in transport infrastructure and renewable energy projects. Information from the Department of Statistics Malaysia (DOSM) supports these findings.
news.headline: Malaysia construction industry set to grow by 6% in 2025 on investments in transport infrastructure and renewable energy projects.

news.summary: A new initiative aims to equip senior leaders with essential strategic insights and governance expertise for effective board positions and enhancing organizational performance. Taking place in Ann Arbor, Michigan on May 7, 2025, the program is offered by the Executive Education program at the University of Michigan's Stephen M. Ross School of Business. This course is designed to enhance participants’ capabilities for board roles, contributing to their professional growth and the overall success of their organizations.
news.headline: Michigan Ross & Emeritus launch Board Director Program to empower execs with governance skills. (Char: 92)

news.summary: Patrols in Akron, Ohio have identified hidden equipment issues to prevent service disruptions. Aerial inspections covered almost 5,000 miles of high-voltage power lines to ensure safe and reliable power supply during the summer. This proactive measure aims to avert any potential interruptions in service.
news.headline: Aerial inspections using helicopters and infrared tech cover nearly 5,000 miles of power lines to prevent service interruptions.

news.summary: A new service is now available in New York offering Ernesta's high-end rugs, expert styling, and convenient staircase design options. This service provides custom-made runners paired with vetted local installers, ensuring a seamless and personalized experience for customers. Ernesta, a renowned home design brand, is celebrated for its designer-quality products. The service was launched on May 7, 2025, aiming to transform staircase aesthetics with tailored solutions. This initiative brings together top-notch rugs and professional installation to elevate home decor standards.
news.headline: Ernesta introduces custom stair runners in NY Tri-State and DC Metro areas, offering designer rugs and installation.

news.summary: USD1, a US dollar stablecoin backed by US President Donald Trump's World Liberty Financial (WLFI), has risen to become the seventh-largest stablecoin globally just two months after its launch. Initially launched with a $3.5 million supply in early March, USD1 now boasts a market capitalization of $2.2 billion, surpassing competitors like FDUSD, PYUSD, and XAUT. The majority of USD1 supply, $2.1 billion, is issued on Binance-backed BNB Chain, with only $14.5 million on the Ethereum-based version. The stablecoin experienced a significant market spike, jumping 1,540% to $2.1 billion in late April. Investment firm MGX's plan to invest $2 billion using USD1 added to its spike. HTX, associated with Justin Sun, became one of the first centralized exchanges to list USD1. Reports suggest that most WLFI investors are from regions outside the US, with over half of the top holders of Trump-branded memecoins residing abroad. The rise of USD1 aligns with Trump's support for stablecoins. WLFI and Binance have denied reports of any formal associations. The stablecoin fight represents a shift from crypto's initial intention of challenging banks to becoming contenders themselves.
news.headline: Trump-backed USD1 is now the 7th largest stablecoin globally, with a market cap of $2.2 billion, issued mainly on BNB Chain. Major exchanges like HTX are listing USD1. Most investors are from overseas. The rise aligns with Trump's pro-stablecoin stance, though denied links to Binance.

news.summary: Drew and Krissy Ebben, seasoned team members, have recently assumed ownership of GarageExperts in Wisconsin on May 7, 2025. They bring with them extensive experience and expertise in custom garage flooring, cabinets, and organizational solutions. This transition marks a significant expansion for GarageExperts in the region, signaling growth and enhanced reach. This move is expected to bolster the company's presence in Wisconsin and contribute to its continued success.
news.headline: GarageExperts® Fox Valley in Green Bay, Wisconsin, sees ownership change as Drew and Krissy Ebben take over, expanding reach.

news.summary: On Wednesday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average surged amid reports of ongoing U.S.-China trade negotiations. Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell is set to make a speech, while cybersecurity firm CrowdStrike experienced a significant drop following news of layoffs. The market rally was driven by optimism surrounding the trade discussions, with the Dow Jones rising. CrowdStrike's plummet was a result of the layoff announcement. Powell is expected to provide further insights into the economic outlook.
news.headline: Dow Jones up on U.S.-China trade talks; CrowdStrike plummeted on layoffs. Fed Chair Powell to address.

news.summary: To celebrate National Skilled Trades Day, eight skilled trades businesses in America will receive over $100,000 in sponsorship and gear. Wolverine, a renowned 142-year-old work boot and apparel company based in Rockford, Michigan, is thrilled to introduce this unique initiative.
news.headline: Wolverine Boots and Jordan Davis support American trades with over $100,000 in sponsorship and gear for National Skilled Trades Day.

news.summary: Astera Labs, Inc. (NASDAQ: ALAB) pleasantly surprised investors with their first-quarter earnings report, showcasing a strong performance. The company reported earnings of 33 cents per share for the quarter, surpassing the analyst consensus of 28 cents per share. Additionally, Astera Labs reported quarterly sales amounting to $159.44 million, also exceeding the analyst consensus of $153.13 million. Jitendra Mohan, the Chief Executive Officer of Astera Labs, expressed satisfaction with the results, highlighting a 13% sequential revenue growth and a substantial 144% year-over-year increase. The CEO also mentioned that the company outperformed its first-quarter gross margin and earnings per share guidance. Astera Labs has been gaining traction with diverse design wins across AI platforms and an expanding portfolio with growing value.
news.headline: Astera Labs, Inc (NASDAQ: ALAB) beats Q1 earnings with $159.44 million in sales and 33 cents per share. CEO cites strong growth.

news.summary: Anthony Scaramucci, the former White House Communications Director, raised concerns about President Donald Trump's increasing involvement in the cryptocurrency industry, cautioning that it may endanger bipartisan attempts to create robust policies for digital assets. Scaramucci, addressing the Financial Times Digital Asset Summit, criticized what he deemed as "distractions" stemming from Trump-associated crypto projects, such as a meme coin based on Solana, a stablecoin endorsed by Trump's son Eric, and various partnerships with firms like Crypto.com. He suggested that these ventures could create avenues for illicit activities like corruption and bribery. Scaramucci noted that these Trump family crypto endeavors could complicate efforts to garner agreement in Washington, especially with older lawmakers who remain wary of cryptocurrencies. He noted that the presence of such ventures could hinder building consensus. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Scaramucci gives Trump 'B+ or A-' on crypto, warns meme coin, DeFi risk derailing policy progress. Warns of corruption.

news.summary: Trulieve Cannabis Corp (OTCQX: TCNNF) released their first-quarter financial report before the market opening on Wednesday. In Q1, their revenue reached $297.8 million, surpassing analyst predictions of $294.4 million. The company also reported an adjusted loss of 2 cents per share for the quarter, which outperformed expectations of an 8-cent loss per share. Their total revenue saw a slight increase compared to the previous year, with 95% of revenue coming from...More details can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Trulieve Q1 revenue beats estimates at $297.8M, EPS at 2 cents per share, higher than expected.

news.summary: The New York Times Co (NYSE: NYT) released their first quarter financial results, exceeding expectations. The company reported a revenue of $636 million, surpassing analyst predictions of $634.83 million. Adjusted earnings for Q1 were reported at 41 cents per share, outperforming estimates of 34 cents per share. Total revenue saw a 7.1% increase compared to the previous year. Revenue breakdown includes subscription revenue of $464.3 million, up 8.2%, advertising revenue of $108.1 million, up 4.2%, and affiliate, licensing, and other revenue of $63.6 million, up 3.7%. The New York Times concluded the quarter with around 11.66 million subscribers.
news.headline: New York Times Q1 earnings beat expectations, reporting $636M revenue and 41 cents EPS, showing resilience amid uncertainty.

news.summary: A company based in Sunnyvale, California has introduced groundbreaking subrogation detection features in CLARA Triage that could significantly benefit insurers. This innovation is expected to assist insurers in pinpointing millions of dollars in overlooked recovery opportunities through artificial intelligence.
news.headline: CLARA Analytics launches AI subrogation detection in CLARA Triage to help insurers recover missed opportunities.

news.summary: On May 7, 2025, Phoenix Aviation Capital and AIP Capital revealed their joint acquisition of a Boeing 787-8 aircraft. Phoenix, a comprehensive aircraft lessor, partnered with AIP Capital, an alternative investment manager specializing in asset-based finance, for this transaction. The agreement signifies the addition of one aircraft to their portfolio, marking a significant collaboration in the aviation industry between the Dublin and Stamford-based firms.
news.headline: Phoenix Aviation Capital purchases one Boeing 787-8 aircraft on lease with LOT Polish with AIP Capital, for asset-based finance.

news.summary: In Chicago, Adoorn, a company specializing in contemporary lockable mailboxes and package boxes, has revealed the introduction of a new addition to its product range - a non-locking mailbox. This release signifies Adoorn's commitment to revolutionizing traditional mailboxes by offering sleek, modern alternatives that eliminate the issues of bulkiness and susceptibility to rust. The new non-locking mailbox, which comes in five different colors, is designed to cater to a diverse range of households seeking both durability and aesthetics. This expansion aligns with Adoorn's objective of providing innovative and practical solutions for residential mail storage needs.
news.headline: Adoorn introduces stylish non-locking mailbox to revolutionize traditional mailboxes. Available in 5 colors.

news.summary: A recent report on the Middle East Gift Card and Incentive Card Market projects a substantial growth rate of 10.7% annually, with expectations to reach a value of US$8.11 billion by 2025. The market in the region showed significant advancement from 2020 to 2024, with a notable compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 12.2%. The trend of growth is predicted to persist going forward, demonstrating a favorable outlook for the industry. This data was released as part of the "Middle East Gift Card and Incentive Card Market Intelligence and Future Growth Dynamics (Databook) - Q1 2025 Update" report now available for further insights.
news.headline: Middle East gift card market to reach $8.11 billion by 2025, growing at 10.7% annually. CAGR of 12.2% from 2020-2024.

news.summary: In Charlotte, North Carolina on May 7, 2025, Prosperity Brands®, the parent company of BNI®, CorporateConnections®, and Scion Social, introduced their new website (prosperitybrands.com) marking their official entry into the market as a united group of purposeful brands. The launch highlights their mission-driven approach and commitment to making a global impact.
news.headline: Prosperity Brands® debuts with new website as global franchisor, parent company of BNI®, CorporateConnections®, and Scion Social.

news.summary: Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE: PWR) disclosed significant updates during various conferences such as Truist Securities Industrials & Services Conference, Bernstein Strategic Decisions Conference, KeyBanc Capital Markets Industrials & Basic Materials Conference, and TD Securities U.S. Corporate Access Day. The company shared crucial insights at these events. The announcement was made in Houston on May 7, 2025.
news.headline: Quanta Services (NYSE: PWR) to join 4 investor conferences in May-June for strategic decisions and growth prospects.

news.summary: In Dublin, a recent report added to ResearchAndMarkets.com indicates that the Chile Construction Market is set to experience growth in various sectors. The report forecasts a 2.5% real terms growth in Chile's construction industry by 2025. This growth will be primarily driven by investments in sectors such as transport infrastructure, mining, and energy. The report focuses on segments including Commercial, Industrial, Infrastructure, Energy and Utilities, Institutional, and Residential markets, with the analysis extending until 2029. This positive outlook is attributed to investments in renewable energy initiatives by trade partners.
news.headline: Chile construction industry to grow by 2.5% in real terms in 2025, supported by investments in transport infrastructure, mining, and energy sector.

news.summary: Ride-sharing company Uber Technologies, Inc (NYSE: UBER) released its fiscal first-quarter 2025 results, showing a 14% year-on-year growth in quarterly revenue to $11.53 billion. This figure fell slightly short of the analyst consensus of $11.62 billion. The company reported an adjusted EPS of 83 cents, surpassing the analyst estimate of 50 cents. Despite the positive EPS, the stock price dropped post-announcement. Revenue from Mobility increased to $6.5 billion, marking a 15% growth year-on-year, while Delivery revenue reached $3.78 billion, up by 18%, and Freight revenue was reported at $1.26 billion, showing a 2% decline year-on-year. The company's Gross Bookings saw a 14% year-on-year increase, totaling $42.82 billion. Mobility Gross Bookings amounted to $21.18 billion, up by 13% year-on-year.
news.headline: Uber reports Q1 2025 results: 14% revenue growth to $11.53B, beating adjusted EPS at 83 cents. Mobility revenue hit $6.5B. Stock declined post report.

news.summary: A popular fast-casual restaurant has recently unveiled its very first side dish, the Tuscan Summer Salad, and also reintroduced the Blueberry Basil Lemonade. Salad and Go, a unique salad chain focused on providing fresh and healthy food at an accessible price point, introduced these new offerings. This move took place in Dallas on May 7, 2025. Salad and Go is known for its commitment to making nutritious meals convenient and affordable for everyone.
news.headline: Salad and Go introduces new Tuscan Summer Salad and brings back Blueberry Basil Lemonade to its summer menu in 2025.

news.summary: Republic Services, Inc. revealed that Antonio (Tony) Carranza from the San Diego area was honored as the 2025 National Residential Driver by the National Waste & Recycling Association for his dedication to safety and service. This recognition highlights Carranza's exceptional commitment in the collection truck driver field. The award was announced on May 7, 2025, in Phoenix. Republic Services, Inc., traded on the NYSE under RSG, commended Carranza for his outstanding performance in the industry.
news.headline: Antonio Carranza named 2025 Residential Driver of the Year by National Waste & Recycling Association for safety and service.

news.summary: Pocketbook Agency, a women-owned and led boutique recruiting firm based in Los Angeles, achieved a significant milestone by receiving national recognition from Forbes. This marks the firm's continued success as it secures a spot on Forbes' esteemed list. This acknowledgment solidifies Pocketbook Agency's position as a prominent player in the recruiting sector. The recent achievement underscores the company's dedication to excellence and highlights its standing in the industry.
news.headline: Pocketbook Agency has made it to the Forbes America's Best Professional Recruiting Firms 2025 list, marking their rise as a top boutique firm. Los Angeles, May 7, 2025.
